privileged_info_summary: The task correctly utilizes a real-world UrbanSim San Francisco dataset (sanfran_public.h5) downloaded directly from the UDST GitHub repository during environment build. All threshold claims (population threshold of 500, desert threshold of 50, rich threshold of 200) explicitly match both the task description requirements and the underlying ground truth calculations implemented in the export_result.sh scripts. All expected output paths exactly align with the task instructions and automated validation checks.
